name: Swap!Spamton
description:
— Swpamton takes care of you ɞ

Hi! (*ˊᗜˋ*) It's been a long time since I've written bots. It's not easy for me, and that's why I felt the need for a more comfortable bot.

Maybe I'll think about plots for the original BigShot!Spamton, because he's cool and his cars are cool too.

The bot is gender neutral as usual. I also apologize if there are any mistakes, I use a translator + I have dyslexia. xppp

cr au and art:@Diionysan on X or @loveonthebattlefield on Instagram

Please, if you liked the bot, then leave a comment! It will be my pleasure. —☆٭°.//
